RV32I.description: 基础 32 位整数指令集

instructions.label: add
instructions.documentation: 加法：R[rd] = R[rs1] + R[rs2]

instructions.label: sub
instructions.documentation: 减法：R[rd] = R[rs1] - R[rs2]

instructions.label: and
instructions.documentation: 按位与：R[rd] = R[rs1] & R[rs2]

instructions.label: or
instructions.documentation: 按位或：R[rd] = R[rs1] | R[rs2]

instructions.label: xor
instructions.documentation: 按位异或：R[rd] = R[rs1] ^ R[rs2]

instructions.label: sll
instructions.documentation: 逻辑左移：R[rd] = R[rs1] << R[rs2]

instructions.label: srl
instructions.documentation: 逻辑右移：R[rd] = R[rs1] >> R[rs2] (Zero-extend)

instructions.label: sra
instructions.documentation: 算术右移：R[rd] = R[rs1] >> R[rs2] (Sign-extend)

instructions.label: slt
instructions.documentation: 有符号小于则置1：if (R[rs1] < R[rs2]) { R[rd] = 1; } else { R[rd] = 0; }

instructions.label: sltu
instructions.documentation: 无符号小于则置1：if (R[rs1] < R[rs2]) { R[rd] = 1; } else { R[rd] = 0; }

instructions.label: addi
instructions.documentation: 加立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] + imm

instructions.label: andi
instructions.documentation: 按位与立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] & imm

instructions.label: ori
instructions.documentation: 按位或立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] | imm

instructions.label: xori
instructions.documentation: 按位异或立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] ^ imm

instructions.label: slli
instructions.documentation: 逻辑左移立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] << imm

instructions.label: srli
instructions.documentation: 逻辑右移立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] >> imm (Zero-extend)

instructions.label: srai
instructions.documentation: 算术右移立即数：R[rd] = R[rs1] >> imm (Sign-extend)

instructions.label: slti
instructions.documentation: 有符号小于立即数则置1：if (R[rs1] < imm) { R[rd] = 1; } else { R[rd] = 0; }

instructions.label: sltiu
instructions.documentation: 无符号小于立即数则置1：if (R[rs1] < imm) { R[rd] = 1; } else { R[rd] = 0; }

instructions.label: lb
instructions.documentation: 加载有符号字节：R[rd] = M[R[rs1] + imm][7:0] (Sign-extend)

instructions.label: lbu
instructions.documentation: 加载无符号字节：R[rd] = M[R[rs1] + imm][7:0] (Zero-extend)

instructions.label: lh
instructions.documentation: 加载有符号半字：R[rd] = M[R[rs1] + imm][15:0] (Sign-extend)

instructions.label: lhu
instructions.documentation: 加载无符号半字：R[rd] = M[R[rs1] + imm][15:0] (Zero-extend)

instructions.label: lw
instructions.documentation: 加载字：R[rd] = M[R[rs1] + imm][31:0]

instructions.label: sb
instructions.documentation: 存储字节：M[R[rs1] + imm][7:0] = R[rs2][7:0]

instructions.label: beq
instructions.documentation: 相等则跳转：if (R[rs1] == R[rs2]) PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: bne
instructions.documentation: 不相等则跳转：if (R[rs1] != R[rs2]) PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: blt
instructions.documentation: 有符号小于则跳转：if (R[rs1] < R[rs2]) PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: bltu
instructions.documentation: 无符号小于则跳转：if (R[rs1] < R[rs2]) PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: bge
instructions.documentation: 有符号大于等于则跳转：if (R[rs1] >= R[rs2]) PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: bgeu
instructions.documentation: 无符号大于等于则跳转：if (R[rs1] >= R[rs2]) PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: jal
instructions.documentation: 跳转并链接：R[rd] = PC + 4; PC = PC + offset

instructions.label: jalr
instructions.documentation: 寄存器跳转并链接：R[rd] = PC + 4; PC = R[rs1] + imm

instructions.label: auipc
instructions.documentation: PC加高位立即数：imm = immu << 12; R[rd] = PC + imm

instructions.label: lui
instructions.documentation: 加载高位立即数：imm = immu << 12; R[rd] = imm

instructions.label: ebreak
instructions.documentation: 环境断点：Asks the debugger to do something (imm = 0)

instructions.label: ecall
instructions.documentation: 环境调用：Asks the OS to do something (imm = 1)

instructions.label: mul
instructions.documentation: 乘法：R[rd] = (R[rs1]) * (R[rs2])

instructions.label: beqz
instructions.documentation: 等于零则跳转: if (R[rs1] == 0) PC += offset (等价于 beq rs1, x0, label)

instructions.label: bnez
instructions.documentation: 不等于零则跳转: if (R[rs1] != 0) PC += offset (等价于 bne rs1, x0, label)

instructions.label: j
instructions.documentation: 无条件跳转: PC += offset (等价于 jal x0, label)

instructions.label: jal
instructions.documentation: 跳转并链接: R[ra] = PC + 4; PC += offset (等价于 jal ra, label)

instructions.label: jr
instructions.documentation: 寄存器跳转: PC = R[rs1] (等价于 jalr x0, rs1, 0)

instructions.label: la
instructions.documentation: 加载符号地址: R[rd] = &label (等价于 auipc + addi)

instructions.label: li
instructions.documentation: 加载立即数: R[rd] = imm (等价于 lui 和/或 addi)

instructions.label: mv
instructions.documentation: 寄存器复制: R[rd] = R[rs1] (等价于 addi rd, rs1, 0)

instructions.label: neg
instructions.documentation: 取负数: R[rd] = -R[rs1] (等价于 sub rd, x0, rs1)

instructions.label: nop
instructions.documentation: 空操作: 什么都不做 (等价于 addi x0, x0, 0)

instructions.label: not
instructions.documentation: 按位取反: R[rd] = ~R[rs1] (等价于 xori rd, rs1, -1)

instructions.label: ret
instructions.documentation: 从子程序返回: PC = R[ra] (等价于 jalr x0, ra, 0)
